meaning: adv.涓嶆伆褰撳湴,涓嶅悎閫傚湴
examples: Suddenly and irrelevantly, she asked him for money.
To-morrow! " Then she added irrelevantly: "You ought to see the baby. "
To deal with grey variables, traditional grey programming method transforms uncertain model to certain one, which irrelevantly ignores the influence of uncertain environment.
